headline: Rothschild Upgrades Colgate-Palmolive (CL) to Buy from Neutral

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Colgate-Palmolive, Lowers Price Target to $95
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Dara Mohsenian   maintains Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $100 to $95.
